mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_name, password, create_time, update_time, last_login_time FROM admin WHERE admin_name = #{adminName}
SELECT id, admin_name, password, create_time, update_time, last_login_time FROM admin WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin ( admin_name, password, create_time, update_time, last_login_time ) VALUES ( #{adminName}, #{password}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_name, password, create_time, update_time, last_login_time FROM admin WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET admin_name = #{adminName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
